html:
Exclusive to:

The Combriner is a structure that can be crafted when standing near Pearl after giving her the Cracked Pearl. It can only be placed within the Crabby Hermit island if the Hermit Home is still on the island.

It initially provides only 5 crafting recipes in the Combrining Filter. Crafting an item takes 6 seconds.

Level 2

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Level 2 for Combriner is unlocked by reaching a Decoration score of 40 points, and locked again at 30 points. After moving Pearl to the mainland, the Combriner can only be placed near Pearl's territory.

If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, the Combiner at the original location can still be used, but will only provide level 1 recipes. If Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, level 2 recipes will be unlocked again once the decoration score reaches 40 points.

Crafting Recipes

Level 1

  • Empty Bottle
  • Flash Freeze Staff
  • Grit Duster
  • Desiccant Pouch
  • Salty Dog's Hat

Level 2

  • Deep Freeze Staff
  • Grit Grinder
  • Desiccant Sack
  • Portage Conch

Tips

  • Placing multiple Combriners in close proximity may prove useful for bulk-crafting items such as Empty Bottles, as one Combriner by itself crafts very slowly.

Assets

  • Combriner Cook Loop
  • Combriner Proximity Loop
  • Combriner Hit Open
  • Combriner Hit Close
  • Combriner Place
  • Combriner Kit (Unused)

Gallery

  • Portage Conch concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Combriner
"Make something with a pinch of salt."
Structure Info
Perk
Grant access to the Combrining Filter.
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×5 ×5 ×3
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"shellweaver"
Exclusive to:
“I salt to make something useful.”
–Wilson
“What's with all the spikes? Someone could lose an eye.”
–Willow
“Careful with prickly lid!”
–Wolfgang
“What should I make, Abigail?”
–Wendy
“SODIUM INFUSION”
–WX-78
“It utilizes salt in a wide variety of ways.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't think it makes pickles.”
–Woodie
“It may just manage to make something useful.”
–Maxwell
“The sea witch hath shared her ways with us. A high hönör, indeed.”
–Wigfrid
“Ms. Pearl taught us to make lots of things with salt!”
–Webber
“These recipes all call for a pinch of salt.”
–Warly
“Make salty things”
–Wormwood
“Ya need protective eye wear to open this thing.”
–Winona
“Halt! Do we have enough salt?”
–Wortox
“Why everything so salty?”
–Wurt
“You can make a lot of stuff out of salt!”
–Walter
“So much to make, and so little time!”
–Wanda

It initially provides only 5 crafting recipes in the Combrining Filter. Crafting an item takes 6 seconds.

After moving Pearl to the mainland, the Combriner can only be placed near Pearl's territory.
If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, the Combiner at the original location can still be used, but will only provide level 1 recipes. If Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, level 2 recipes will be unlocked again once the decoration score reaches 40 points.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Combriner là một công trình có thể được chế tạo khi đứng gần Pearl sau khi đưa cho cô ấy Cracked Pearl. Nó chỉ có thể được đặt trong đảo Crabby Hermit nếu Nhà Hermit vẫn còn trên đảo.

The '''Combriner''' is a structure that can be crafted when standing near [[Pearl]] after giving her the [[Cracked Pearl]]. It can only be placed within the Crabby Hermit island if the [[Hermit Home]] is still on the island. 

It initially provides only 5 crafting recipes in the [[Combrining Filter]]. Crafting an item takes 6 seconds.

==Level 2==
{{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}}
Level 2 for '''Combriner''' is unlocked by reaching a [[Crabby Hermit#Decoration|Decoration]] score of 40 points, and locked again at 30 points.
After moving Pearl to the mainland, the Combriner can only be placed near [[Pearl]]'s territory.

If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, the Combiner at the original location can still be used, but will only provide level 1 recipes. If Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, level 2 recipes will be unlocked again once the decoration score reaches 40 points.

== Crafting Recipes ==
{{#lst:Combrining Filter|Craftable Items}}

== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==

* Placing multiple Combriners in close proximity may prove useful for bulk-crafting items such as [[Empty Bottle/DST|Empty Bottles]], as one Combriner by itself crafts very slowly.

== {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets ==
